# HaTchi-MaXchi

> An htmx4-native design system. The unit of reuse is a Hyperpart: a
> server-rendered partial + its endpoint exchange contracts + an
> optional vanilla-JS controller. No client framework.

## Sources

- [Component registry (source of truth)](https://github.com/manwithacat/hatchi-maxchi/blob/main/site/registry.py): canonical markup + exchange contracts per component — parse this, don't scrape the gallery
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/manwithacat/hatchi-maxchi/blob/main/AGENTS.md): consuming + contributing with a coding agent
- [README](https://github.com/manwithacat/hatchi-maxchi#readme): setup, theming, prefixing, releases
## Blueprints (full-page layout motifs)

- [Workspace with drawer](https://manwithacat.github.io/hatchi-maxchi/blueprints/workspace-drawer.html): The app-shell motif: a sidebar of navigation, a content pane with a header cluster and a KPI grid, and a detail drawer on the native <dialog>. The sidebar wraps under the content on narrow screens — no media query anywhere on this page.

- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/manwithacat/hatchi-maxchi/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): this repo is a synced mirror of the Dazzle monorepo; PRs land via a credited port
